pressure_assessment.reason: Option C blocked by auth_middleware bug; CSRF works but auth has code defect.

lane_3_negative_control.detail: POST without CSRF correctly blocked; POST without auth correctly blocked

lane_4_create_thread.detail: Internal auth header does not bypass access_token cookie requirement due to auth_middleware.py logic bug

lane_5_get_thread.detail: Same auth bug affects GET endpoints

lane_6_post_runs.detail: POST /runs analysis deferred - auth must be fixed first

bug_confirmed.description: auth_middleware checks access_token cookie before internal auth header, then unconditionally calls get_current_user_from_request (which requires access_token), preventing internal auth from working
bug_confirmed.impact: Option C test harness cannot work until this bug is fixed
bug_confirmed.fix_needed: Reorder auth_middleware to check internal_user BEFORE calling get_current_user_from_request

csrf_analysis.detail: CSRF mechanism is correctly implemented; test fixture works for CSRF validation

lane_9_next_phase.detail: Must fix auth_middleware bug before Option C can work
